# Hymoex

> Hybrid Modular Coordinated Experts — A cognitive architecture for scalable multi-agent systems.

## Docs

- [Installation](/docs/getting-started/installation): Installation and setup
- [Quickstart](/docs/getting-started/quickstart): Build your first multi-agent system
- [Architecture Overview](/docs/architecture/overview): The 7-role agent taxonomy and hierarchical design
- [Deployment Modalities](/docs/architecture/modalities): One-Line MoE, One-Line Supervisor, and MoE MultiLine
- [MoE Gating](/docs/architecture/moe-gating): Softmax gating and Rational-Raffle fusion
- [Agents API](/docs/api-reference/agents): Complete reference for all seven agent classes
- [Messaging API](/docs/api-reference/messaging): The 7 HIP message types for inter-agent communication
- [Modalities API](/docs/api-reference/modalities): Modality classes, migration functions, and auto-selection
- [Migration Guide](/docs/guides/migration): Scale progressively from M1 to M2 to M3
- [LLM Providers](/docs/guides/llm-providers): Configure OpenAI, Anthropic, Mock, and custom providers

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/Pymut/hymoex
- Paper: https://github.com/Pymut/hymoex/tree/main/packages/research/papers/hymoex-cognitive-architecture
